name: durak-mini-app
description: Telegram Mini App: Подкидной и Переводной Дурак

scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/frontend && npm run test -w apps/backend && npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/game-core
scripts.lint:core: npm run lint -w apps/frontend && npm run lint -w apps/backend && npm run lint -w packages/game-core
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:down && npm run db:up
scripts.db:prepare: npm run db:up && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://durak:durak@localhost:5432/durak npm run prisma:generate && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://durak:durak@localhost:5432/durak npm run prisma:migrate && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://durak:durak@localhost:5432/durak npm run prisma:check
scripts.db:test:prepare: npm run db:up && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://durak:durak@localhost:5433/durak_test npm run prisma:generate && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://durak:durak@localhost:5433/durak_test npm run prisma:migrate && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://durak:durak@localhost:5433/durak_test npm run prisma:check
scripts.e2e:http: npm run build:backend && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://durak:durak@localhost:5433/durak_test npm run test:e2e -w apps/backend
scripts.test:e2e:db: npm run e2e:prepare && npm run e2e:http
